<% local function js_string(value) local replacements = { ['\\'] = '\\\\', ['"'] = '\\"', ["'"] = "\\u0027", ["\b"] = "\\b", ["\f"] = "\\f", ["\n"] = "\\n", ["\r"] = "\\r", ["\t"] = "\\t", ["<"] = "\\u003C", [">"] = "\\u003E", ["&"] = "\\u0026", } local escaped = tostring(value or ""):gsub('[%z\1-\31\\\"\'<>&]', function(ch) return replacements[ch] or string.format("\\u%04x", ch:byte()) end) return '"' .. escaped .. '"' end local view = self.fileuni_view or {} local language = view.language or {} local backend = view.backend or {} local labels = backend.labels or {} local language_buttons = language.buttons or {} local host = backend.host or "" local port = backend.port or "19000" local config_path = backend.config_path or "/var/lib/fileuni/config.toml" local notice = backend.notice or {} local service = backend.service or {} local binary = backend.binary or {} local architecture = backend.architecture or {} local requirements = backend.requirements or {} local releases = backend.releases or {} local actions = backend.actions or {} %>

<%= pcdata(language.section_title or "Language") %>

<%= pcdata(language.hint or "") %>

<% for _, item in ipairs(language_buttons) do %> <%= pcdata(item.label) %> <% end %>
<%= pcdata(language.configured_label or "Configured language") %>: <%= pcdata(language.configured_value or "Auto") %>
<%= pcdata(language.effective_label or "Current page language") %>: <%= pcdata(language.effective_value or "English") %>
<% if notice.message and notice.message ~= "" then %>

<%= pcdata(notice.message) %>

<% end %>

<%= pcdata(labels.service_controls or "Service Controls") %>

<%= pcdata(labels.service_controls_hint or "") %>

<%= pcdata(labels.service_status or "Service status") %>
<%= pcdata(service.status_text or "Unknown") %>
<%= pcdata(labels.service_boot_status or "Boot status") %>
<%= pcdata(service.boot_status_text or "Unknown") %>
<%= pcdata(labels.cli_binary or "CLI binary") %>
<%= pcdata(binary.status_text or "Unknown") %>
<%= pcdata(labels.binary_path or "Binary path") %>
<%= pcdata(binary.path or "/usr/bin/fileuni") %>
<%= pcdata(labels.binary_version or "CLI version") %>
<%= pcdata(binary.version_text or "Unknown") %>
<%= pcdata(labels.package_state or "Package state") %>
<%= pcdata(binary.package_text or "Unknown") %>
<%= pcdata(labels.current_architecture or "Current architecture") %>
<%= pcdata(architecture.text or "Unknown") %>
<%= pcdata(labels.opkg_architecture or "opkg primary architecture") %>
<%= pcdata(architecture.opkg_primary_arch or "-") %>
<%= pcdata(labels.opkg_arch_list or "opkg architectures") %>
<%= pcdata(table.concat(architecture.opkg_architectures or {}, ", ")) %>
<%= pcdata(labels.opkg_status or "opkg status") %>
<%= pcdata(requirements.opkg_text or "Unknown") %>
<%= pcdata(labels.download_tool_status or "Download tool") %>
<%= pcdata(requirements.download_tool_text or "Unknown") %>
<%= pcdata(labels.ca_bundle_status or "CA bundle") %>
<%= pcdata(requirements.ca_bundle_text or "Unknown") %>
<%= pcdata(labels.json_parser_status or "JSON parser") %>
<%= pcdata(requirements.json_parser_text or "Unknown") %>
/> /> />

<%= pcdata(labels.backend_title or "Backend Access") %>

<%= pcdata(labels.config_file or "Config file") %>
<%= pcdata(config_path) %>
<%= pcdata(labels.detected_backend or "Detected backend") %>
<%= pcdata(backend.backend_hint or ("http://:" .. port .. "/ui")) %>
<%= pcdata(labels.config_detected or "Config detected") %>
<%= pcdata(backend.config_detected_text or "") %>
<%= pcdata(labels.open_backend_hint or "") %>

<%= pcdata(backend.admin_reset_hint or "") %>

<%= pcdata(labels.release_management or "Release Management") %>

<%= pcdata(labels.release_hint or "") %>

<%= pcdata(labels.release_refresh or "Refresh") %>
<%= pcdata(labels.release_source or "Release source") %>: <%= pcdata(backend.release_source or "https://fileuni.com/api/downloads/releases") %>
<% for _, release in ipairs(releases.items or {}) do %>

<%= pcdata(release.channel_label or "Release") %>

<%= pcdata(labels.release_version or "Version") %>: <%= pcdata(release.version or "") %>
<%= pcdata(labels.release_published_at or "Published") %>: <%= pcdata(release.published_at or "") %>
<%= pcdata(labels.release_asset or "Asset") %>: <%= pcdata(release.asset_name ~= "" and release.asset_name or "-") %><% if release.asset_size and release.asset_size ~= "" then %> (<%= pcdata(release.asset_size) %>)<% end %>
<% if release.message and release.message ~= "" then %>

<%= pcdata(release.message) %>

<% end %>
/> <% if release.details_url and release.details_url ~= "" then %> <%= pcdata(labels.release_details or "Details") %> <% end %>
<% end %>
